title: Ultra Detailed Fantasy Anime Trading Card Illustration
sourceTitle: Ultra Detailed Fantasy Anime Trading Card Illustration

imagePrompts.prompt:
Ultra-detailed fantasy anime trading card illustration, vertical composition, premium UR rarity collectible card design, cinematic cel-shaded anime rendering, masterpiece quality, glossy holographic foil texture, magical fantasy atmosphere, highly detailed ornamental frame with pink-gold iridescent border, sparkling particles and soft bloom lighting.

A beautiful fairy heroine standing in the center, youthful female elf fairy, long flowing golden-blonde hair with soft pink highlights, large sparkling pink eyes, gentle smile, pointed elf ears, elegant facial features, soft anime skin shading, slim petite body proportions. She wears an elegant layered pink fantasy dress with gold trim and ribbons, non-revealing outfit, magical princess aesthetic, delicate floral accessories, lace details, gemstone decorations, flowing fabric, fantasy idol style.

Transparent pink butterfly-like fairy wings glowing softly behind her. She holds an ornate magical fairy staff with a glowing pink crystal core and gold filigree design. Floral crown with pink flowers and crystal ornaments in her hair.

Background is a luminous enchanted forest filled with dreamy sunlight rays, glowing flowers, magical butterflies, floating particles, soft bokeh effects, fantasy trees, sparkling atmosphere, pastel pink and gold color palette, cinematic lighting.

Top of the card contains large elegant text:
“UR Battle Idol”
with a premium rarity emblem.
Top-right corner shows:
“No.028”
Right side includes a clean English profile panel with fantasy RPG style typography:
Name: Lyria
Race: Fairy
Age: 120
Height: 138cm
Weapon: Fairystaff
Attribute: Light
Type: Support
Specialty: Healing Magic

Bottom nameplate:
“Lyria”
Subtitle:
“Light Fairy of Hope”
Bottom text box contains elegant English fantasy lore description.

High-end Japanese anime card game style, ultra detailed eyes, detailed hair strands, glossy rendering, magical lighting, holographic reflections, collectible TCG artwork, fantasy mobile game splash art quality, soft pink glow, sparkling effects, premium card layout, extremely detailed, 8k anime illustration, masterpiece, best quality.
